title: LBOs and PE: Which of the following is a key characteristic of a...
summary: Identify debt as the key characteristic and primary financing source in leveraged buyouts.
prompt: Which of the following is a key characteristic of a leveraged buyout (LBO)?

options.text: A formal tender offer to shareholders
An LBO is characterized by the acquisition of a company primarily financed

solution: An LBO is characterized by the acquisition of a company primarily financed through debt, allowing the buyer to leverage the target's assets to fund the purchase.
